title: Anatomy of the Genesis Block
description: A visual breakdown of the unique components and symbolic role of the genesis block as the immutable foundation of a blockchain.
relationships: Genesis Block has no predecessor, so its 'Previous Hash' is a hardcoded value (e.g., 0...0)
The hash of the Genesis Block is digitally signed and stored in the header of Block 1
Block 1 points back to the Genesis Block's hash as its proof of origin
All subsequent blocks form a chain by pointing to the hash of the preceding block
